name: Rod-N-Staff Wheelchair
recent_news: No public footprint found; 361 area code (Corpus Christi/South TX). Listed as ~10 employees / ~$518K revenue. Likely micro NEMT wheelchair van operator, not a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Too small and appears to be NEMT-only wheelchair van service, not student transportation. Not a meaningful Summit tuck-in target.

name: Backroad Transportation LLC
recent_news: Michigan LLC incorporated 10/07/2020 (active). USDOT 3495817 registered carrier based in Palms, MI (Huron County, rural Thumb region). One listing describes service as 'transportation for the disabled'; another DOT record (USDOT 2940420) suggests motor-carrier/freight activity. No evidence of school district contracts.
fit_notes: Micro-operator in rural MI Thumb; likely NEMT/disability transport rather than yellow-bus contractor. Not a credible Summit tuck-in target.

name: Crown Limo & Sedan Svc
recent_news: Family-owned by Ed & Tammie Chism since Dec 1996; diversified fleet (sedans, SUVs, vans, limos, party bus, vintage trolley, 35-pax luxury charter bus). Operates as Crown Limousine & Sedan Service, LLC / dba Crown Transportation, Northport AL.
fit_notes: Not a school-bus / student-transport operator. Limo/charter/airport service. Outside Summit's tuck-in thesis.

name: Chamblee Bus Ctr Asscaites LLC
service_types: likely real-estate holding LLC tied to a school-bus dealership
recent_news: Registered LLC at 1349 W Peachtree St NW, Atlanta (One Atlantic Center / midtown office building) with only 3 employees but $5M revenue — profile consistent with a holding/real-estate LLC, not an operating yellow-bus contractor. Name likely relates to the Chamblee, GA area where a regional school-bus dealer footprint exists (note: The Bus Center Atlanta is a Ford/GMC school-bus dealer affiliated with Transportation South, Mid-South Bus Center, and Hoekstra Transportation).
fit_notes: Almost certainly a holding/dealer-adjacent LLC rather than an independent route-contract operator. Not a Summit operating-company tuck-in target; if related to a Ford/GMC school-bus dealer it would be a vendor, not a contractor.

name: BRI Mar Transit
recent_news: Brimar Transit (712 Rebecca Ave, Pittsburgh PA 15221), owned by Marciano Nesbitt, opened BBB file 5/5/2015 but BBB now lists the business as OUT OF BUSINESS. Not on current Pittsburgh Public Schools approved carrier list (which includes First Student, Krise, ABC Transit, Sierra, Briggs, AJ Myers, etc.).
fit_notes: Appears defunct / not currently operating; not on PPS carrier roster. Not a viable Summit tuck-in target.
